name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf is an indoor golf facility that combines simulator play, practice, and social events. The venue features state-of-the-art Trackman simulator bays, high-speed swing cameras, and access to over 200 virtual golf courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. Each location offers a full-service bar with a chef-inspired menu and a lively social atmosphere. Pricing varies by location, day, and time, with hourly simulator rentals and membership options available that include discounts on services, lessons, and food.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate and actionable swing data
No-dress-code atmosphere makes golf accessible and welcoming for all skill levels
Combination of golf simulator, full bar, and chef-inspired menu offers a complete experience
Access to 200+ world-class virtual courses, including iconic PGA Tour venues

food_and_drink.notes: Chef-inspired menu available; food deals like $5 and $10 wings, half-price pizzas, and $5 appetizers during special hours.
Full-service bar available with drink specials, $5 shots, and happy hour deals.

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators with launch monitors providing data on ball flight, spin rate, swing speed, club path, and attack angle.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify if clubs are provided, so it is recommended to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full-service bar and a chef-inspired menu.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies based on simulator availability and player pace, but standard bay rental is by the hour.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior clinics for kids ages 6-14 and is available for kids' parties.
